title: Fix free transform tool to prevent unwanted node duplication on click

requirements.text: Remove any copy/paste behavior from the free transform tool when clicking on nodes in the diagram canvas

quotes: clicking on nodes in the diagram triggers unwanted copy/paste
the free transform tool only allow moving/rotating/scaling nodes

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking on any node in the diagram does not create duplicate copies
The free transform tool only enables moving, rotating, and scaling operations
No copy/paste functionality is triggered by node clicks in the canvas

requirements.text: Ensure the free transform tool behavior applies consistently to all node types in the diagram (icons, text labels, images, connections)
acceptanceCriteria: Icons can be transformed without duplication
Text labels can be transformed without duplication
Images can be transformed without duplication
Connection lines can be transformed without duplication

constraints: Do not modify the backend schema or actor implementation
Maintain the current undo/redo behavior for transform operations
nonGoals: Adding new transform capabilities beyond move, rotate, and scale
Implementing copy/paste functionality with keyboard shortcuts
Changing the visual appearance of the free transform tool
